responsibilities: Design and implement scalable ETL pipelines using Apache Spark and Airflow to process terabyte-scale datasets
Build and maintain data warehouses and data lakes that serve as the single source of truth for analytics
Develop streaming data pipelines using Apache Kafka to support real-time analytics and operational dashboards
Write efficient, well-tested SQL transformations using dbt to model raw data into analytics-ready tables
Optimize data pipeline performance and cost by tuning queries, partitioning strategies, and resource allocation
Implement data quality checks and monitoring to detect schema drift, missing data, and pipeline failures
Collaborate with data scientists and analysts to understand data requirements and deliver reliable datasets
Design and maintain data models that support efficient querying across business intelligence and reporting tools
Automate data ingestion from third-party APIs, databases, and SaaS platforms into centralized data infrastructure
Document data lineage, pipeline architecture, and schema definitions to support cross-team data governance
